Look for signs: #28 Crestline; #4 8th Street Motorcycle. This earns: Crestline Trail segments 1-4. Section estimate: 1.83 official mi, ~33 min moving, 444 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Red Cliffs.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Red Cliffs
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Red Cliffs, continue straight onto Red Cliffs. Use Red Cliffs for 0.1 mi. This earns: both Red Cliffs official segments. Section estimate: 1.27 official mi, ~19 min moving, 14 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Kestral Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn right onto Kestral Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Kestral Trail, turn right onto Kestral Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.29 mi. Look for signs: #29 Lower Hulls Gulch; #39A Kestrel. This earns: Kestral Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 0.75 official mi, ~15 min moving, 260 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Owl's Roost.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Owl's Roost
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Owl's Roost, turn onto Owl's Roost. Use #39A Kestrel, Kestrel for 0.61 mi. Look for signs: #39A Kestrel. This earns: Owl's Roost segment 1. Section estimate: 0.64 official mi, ~10 min moving, 8 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Chickadee Ridge Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Chickadee Ridge Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Chickadee Ridge Trail, turn onto Chickadee Ridge Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.09 mi. Look for signs: #36A Chickadee Ridge; #35 Gold Finch. This earns: both Chickadee Ridge Trail official segments. Section estimate: 0.6 official mi, ~10 min moving, 66 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Gold Finch.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Gold Finch
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Gold Finch, turn onto Gold Finch. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.23 mi. Look for signs: #35A Red-Winged Blackbird; #35A Red-Winged Blackbird (Middle); #36A Chickadee Ridge; #34 Hulls Pond. This earns: both Gold Finch official segments. Section estimate: 0.34 official mi, ~7 min moving, 53 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to 15th St. Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto 15th St. Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with 15th St. Trail, turn onto 15th St. Trail. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.12 mi. Look for signs: #34 Hulls Pond. This earns: 15th St. Trail segment 1. Section estimate: 0.45 official mi, ~11 min moving, 128 ft climb.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via #29 Lower Hulls Gulch, 15th St. Trail, 15th Street #41, Chickadee Ridge, Chickadee Ridge #36A, North Sunset Peak Road, OSM service connector 19868, Red Fox (Dog Off-Leash)
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After 15th St. Trail, you are not fully back at the car. Use #29 Lower Hulls Gulch, 15th St. Trail, 15th Street #41, Chickadee Ridge, Chickadee Ridge #36A, North Sunset Peak Road, OSM service connector 19868, Red Fox (Dog Off-Leash) back toward Hulls Gulch Trailhead. Expect about 1.05 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.

outing.label: 10A
outing.block_name: Harlow's / Spring Creek / north pod
outing.trailhead: Harlow's / Hidden Springs west access probe

parking.name: Harlow's / Hidden Springs west access probe

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Harlow's / Hidden Springs west access probe
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Leave car toward Harlow's Hollows
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, head toward Harlow's Hollows. Follow the GPX access line for about 8.78 mi before official credit starts.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Harlow's Hollows
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Harlow's Hollows. This earns: Harlow's Hollows segments 4, 3, 2, and 1. Section estimate: 1.41 official mi, ~36 min moving, 533 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Harlow's Hollows Connector. Connector also uses: Ranch Access Connector (RAC) - #18a. Connector also uses: Burnt Car Draw - #10.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Harlow's Hollows Connector
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Harlow's Hollows Connector, turn onto Harlow's Hollows Connector. This earns: Harlow's Hollows Connector segment 1. Section estimate: 0.88 official mi, ~21 min moving, 432 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Ricochet.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Ricochet
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Ricochet, turn onto Ricochet. Use Harlow's Hollows - #16, Spring Creek - #9 for 0.89 mi. Look for signs: #16 Harlow's Hollows; #9 Spring Creek. This earns: Ricochet segment 1. Section estimate: 0.7 official mi, ~18 min moving, 471 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Shooting Range.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Shooting Range
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Shooting Range, continue straight onto Shooting Range. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.1 mi. Look for signs: #2 Ricochet; #5 Shooting Range. This earns: Shooting Range segment 1. Section estimate: 0.28 official mi, ~8 min moving, 143 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Whistling Pig.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn left onto Whistling Pig
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Whistling Pig, turn left onto Whistling Pig. This earns: Whistling Pig segment 1. Section estimate: 0.88 official mi, ~20 min moving, 328 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Twisted Spring.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Twisted Spring
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Twisted Spring, turn onto Twisted Spring. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.12 mi. Look for signs: #3 Whistling Pig. This earns: Twisted Spring segments 1-3. Section estimate: 0.75 official mi, ~17 min moving, 86 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Spring Creek.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn around onto Spring Creek
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Spring Creek, turn around onto Spring Creek. Use Twisted Spring Trail - #8 for 0.05 mi. Look for signs: #8 Twisted Spring Trail. This earns: both Spring Creek official segments. Section estimate: 2.42 official mi, ~58 min moving, 1188 ft climb.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Follow connector/access back to car
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Spring Creek, you are not fully back at the car. Follow the GPX connector/access line back to Harlow's / Hidden Springs west access probe. Expect about 3.06 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.

outing.block_name: Freestone / Three Bears / Shane's / Curlew connector block

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Freestone Creek Trailhead
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Start on #22C Mountain Cove
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, take #22C Mountain Cove toward Three Bears Trail. This access trail/road is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit. Follow the GPX access line for about 0.79 mi. Watch for signs: #22C Mountain Cove.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Three Bears Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Three Bears Trail. This earns: Three Bears Trail segments 1-5. Section estimate: 4.7 official mi, ~81 min moving, 1429 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Femrite's Patrol.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Femrite's Patrol
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Femrite's Patrol, turn onto Femrite's Patrol. Use the named connector trail/road for 1.1 mi. Look for signs: #26 Three Bears; #3 Watchman. This earns: Femrite's Patrol segment 4. Section estimate: 0.06 official mi, ~2 min moving, 27 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Freestone Ridge.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Freestone Ridge
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Freestone Ridge, turn onto Freestone Ridge. Use the named connector trail/road for 1.01 mi. Look for signs: #6 Femrite's Patrol Trail. This earns: both Freestone Ridge official segments. Section estimate: 2.01 official mi, ~26 min moving, 17 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Two Point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Two Point
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Two Point, turn onto Two Point. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.67 mi. Look for signs: #20 Ridgecrest; #26 Three Bears. This earns: Two Point segment 1. Section estimate: 1.2 official mi, ~25 min moving, 285 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Shane's Trail.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn left onto Shane's Trail
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Shane's Trail, turn left onto Shane's Trail. This earns: Shane's Trail segments 1-3. Section estimate: 1.84 official mi, ~28 min moving, 268 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Shane's Connector.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Shane's Connector
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Shane's Connector, turn onto Shane's Connector. This earns: Shane's Connector segment 1. Section estimate: 0.44 official mi, ~7 min moving, 119 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Fat Tire Traverse.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Fat Tire Traverse
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Fat Tire Traverse, turn onto Fat Tire Traverse. Use the named connector trail/road for 3.22 mi. Look for signs: #26 Three Bears; #26A Shane's; #5 Freestone Ridge. This earns: Fat Tire Traverse segment 1. Section estimate: 1.2 official mi, ~19 min moving, 262 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Curlew Connection.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn right onto Curlew Connection
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Curlew Connection, turn right onto Curlew Connection. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.69 mi. Look for signs: #42 Fat Tire Traverse. This earns: both Curlew Connection official segments. Section estimate: 2.9 official mi, ~80 min moving, 2486 ft climb. ASCENT REQUIRED on Curlew Connection 1 and Curlew Connection 2.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via #26 Three Bears, #45 Curlew Connection, #5 Freestone Ridge, Curlew Connection, Freestone Ridge, Three Bears
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Curlew Connection, you are not fully back at the car. Use #26 Three Bears, #45 Curlew Connection, #5 Freestone Ridge, Curlew Connection, Freestone Ridge, Three Bears back toward Freestone Creek Trailhead. Expect about 3.74 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.
